question: schemes for minorities
cypher:
MATCH (s:Scheme)
OPTIONAL MATCH (s)-[:DETAILS]->(desc:Description)
OPTIONAL MATCH (s)-[:HAS_TAG]->(t:Tag)
WHERE toLower(s.name) CONTAINS toLower("minority")
   OR toLower(s.objective) CONTAINS toLower("minority")
   OR toLower(desc.text) CONTAINS toLower("minority")
   OR toLower(t.name) CONTAINS toLower("minority")
RETURN s.name, s.objective, desc.text, t.name
LIMIT 200

question: who founded kisan vikas scheme
cypher:
MATCH (s:Scheme)-[:FOUNDED_BY]->(f:Founder)
WHERE toLower(s.name) CONTAINS toLower("kisan vikas")
RETURN s.name, f.name
LIMIT 50

question: schemes run by education department
cypher:
MATCH (s:Scheme)-[:LIES_UNDER]->(d:Department)
WHERE toLower(d.name) CONTAINS toLower("education")
RETURN s.name, s.objective
LIMIT 200

question: how many schemes are available in maharashtra
cypher:
MATCH (s:Scheme)-[:HAS_LOCATION]->(sl:Location)
WHERE toLower(sl.name) CONTAINS toLower("maharashtra")
RETURN count(s)
LIMIT 50

question: number of central schemes
cypher:

WHERE toLower(sb.name) CONTAINS toLower("central")
RETURN count(s)
LIMIT 50

question: list schemes for farmers in patna
cypher:
MATCH (s:Scheme)-[:HAS_LOCATION]->(sl:Location)
OPTIONAL MATCH (s)-[:DETAILS]->(desc:Description)
OPTIONAL MATCH (s)-[:HAS_TAG]->(t:Tag)
WITH *
WHERE toLower(sl.name) CONTAINS toLower("patna")
  AND (toLower(s.name) CONTAINS toLower("farmer")
   )
RETURN s.name, o.name, desc.text, sl.name, t.name
LIMIT 200

question: scholarship schemes for students in maharashtra
cypher:
MATCH (s:Scheme)-[:HAS_LOCATION]->(sl:Location)
OPTIONAL MATCH (s)-[:DETAILS]->(desc:Description)
WITH *
WHERE toLower(sl.name) CONTAINS toLower("maharashtra")
  AND (toLower(s.name) CONTAINS toLower("scholarship")
    OR toLower(desc.text) CONTAINS toLower("scholarship")
    OR toLower(o.name) CONTAINS toLower("scholarship")
    OR toLower(s.name) CONTAINS toLower("student"))
RETURN s.name, o.name, desc.text, sl.name
LIMIT 200

question: health schemes for women in bihar
cypher:
MATCH (s:Scheme)-[:HAS_LOCATION]->(sl:Location)
OPTIONAL MATCH (s)-[:DETAILS]->(desc:Description)
OPTIONAL MATCH (s)-[:HAS_TAG]->(t:Tag)
WITH *
WHERE toLower(sl.name) CONTAINS toLower("bihar")
  AND (toLower(s.name) CONTAINS toLower("health")
    OR toLower(o.name) CONTAINS toLower("health")
    OR toLower(desc.text) CONTAINS toLower("health"))
  AND (toLower(s.name) CONTAINS toLower("women")
    OR toLower(desc.text) CONTAINS toLower("women")
    OR toLower(t.name) CONTAINS toLower("women"))
RETURN s.name, o.name, desc.text, sl.name, t.name
LIMIT 200

question: housing schemes for sc beneficiaries in uttar pradesh
cypher:
MATCH (s:Scheme)-[:HAS_LOCATION]->(sl:Location)
OPTIONAL MATCH (s)-[:DETAILS]->(desc:Description)
OPTIONAL MATCH (s)-[:HAS_TAG]->(t:Tag)
WITH *
WHERE toLower(sl.name) CONTAINS toLower("uttar pradesh")
  AND (toLower(s.name) CONTAINS toLower("housing")
    OR toLower(o.name) CONTAINS toLower("housing")
    OR toLower(desc.text) CONTAINS toLower("housing"))
  AND (toLower(s.name) CONTAINS toLower("sc")
    OR toLower(desc.text) CONTAINS toLower("sc")
    OR toLower(t.name) CONTAINS toLower("sc"))
RETURN s.name, o.name, desc.text, sl.name, t.name
LIMIT 200

question: schemes for disabled persons in karnataka
cypher:
MATCH (s:Scheme)-[:HAS_LOCATION]->(sl:Location)
OPTIONAL MATCH (s)-[:DETAILS]->(desc:Description)
OPTIONAL MATCH (s)-[:HAS_TAG]->(t:Tag)
WITH *
WHERE toLower(sl.name) CONTAINS toLower("karnataka")
  AND (toLower(s.name) CONTAINS toLower("disabled")
    OR toLower(o.name) CONTAINS toLower("disabled")
    OR toLower(desc.text) CONTAINS toLower("disabled")
    OR toLower(t.name) CONTAINS toLower("disabled"))
